info.title: BookReaders API
info.description:
BookReaders REST API

A comprehensive backend for a book reader community platform supporting catalog browsing, reading progress tracking, social engagement, and a full commerce experience.

**Key Features:**
- **Public:** Browse books, authors, and categories.
- **User:** Track reading progress, rate books, manage cart, place orders, participate in discussions.
- **Admin:** Full back-office control over catalog, users, posts, orders, and promocodes.

**Authentication:**
This API uses JWT (JSON Web Tokens). Register via `/api/v1/auth/register` or log in via `/api/v1/auth/authenticate` to obtain a Bearer token.

put.description: Edit the content of an existing post.
Updates the text of an existing comment. User must be the owner.

delete.description: Deletes a comment. User must be the owner.

put.description: Updates text fields only. Use PATCH for photo/file.

get.description: Get the current user's rating for a specific book.

put.description: Add or update the current user's rating for a specific book (score 1-5).

get.description: Get the current user's reading progress for a specific book.

put.description: Update or create reading progress for the current user on a specific book.
Updates text fields only. Use PATCH for photo.

get.description: Paginated list of posts for a room.

post.description: Adds a post to a specific discussion room.
Likes the post if not already liked, unlikes if already liked.

get.description: Returns paginated top-level comments for a post. Replies can be fetched lazily.

post.summary: Add a comment to a post
post.description: Creates a top-level comment on a specific post.
Creates a reply to an existing comment.

get.description: Search by title, description, or author. Returns active books only.

post.description: Upload JSON data and E-book cover together.
Upload JSON data and Image file together.
Activates the account using the email code.
Updates password if the verification code is valid.
Resends the code for activation or password reset.
Creates a new account and sends a verification email.
Returns a JWT token if credentials are valid.

get.description: Includes deleted books and extra metadata.
